token_bypass.title: Token bypass (recommended)
token_bypass.description:
Enter the tokens obtained from bypass_aigostar.py.
iotToken expires every 20h but is auto-refreshed by HA.
refreshToken lasts ~8 days.

verify.title: Email verification
verify.description:
A verification code has been sent to your email.
Please enter the code below.

error.cannot_connect: Token invalid or expired. Run bypass_aigostar.py to get fresh tokens.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check Home Assistant logs.

sync_devices.name: Sync devices
sync_devices.description: Re-discover all devices from your Aigostar account and add new ones.
